nasb.text: and Johanan became the father of Azariah (it was he who served as the priest in the house which Solomon built in Jerusalem),

esv.text: and Johanan fathered Azariah (it was he who served as priest in the house that Solomon built in Jerusalem).

ccb.text: 约哈难生亚撒利雅——这亚撒利雅在耶路撒冷   所罗门建的圣殿里任祭司，
